name: search
description: Built-in VS Code-style SEARCH panel: search and replace across all files in the active folder (bundled — see extensions/build.mjs).

search.maxResults.description: Maximum number of matches a single search returns before it's cut off.

search.excludeGlobs.description: Comma-separated list of directory/file globs excluded from search by default (in addition to whatever the 'files to exclude' box adds).
